summary: Delete orphaned sefer-yetirah (Sefaria) duplicate of sefer-yetzirah
description:
Delete the orphaned sefer-yetirah duplicate.

corpus/jewish_mysticism/sefer-yetirah/ (6 chunks) + chunking/jewish_mysticism/sefer-yetirah.toml exist with NO manifest source. It is the abandoned Sefaria source (config translator = "Sefaria Community Translation") that the manifest's jewish_mysticism comment said to REMOVE in favor of sefer-yetzirah (Westcott, sacred-texts jud/yetzirah.htm, 7 chunks, present and correct). The manifest line was removed; the leftover config + corpus dir were never cleaned up.

FIX:
- Delete chunking/jewish_mysticism/sefer-yetirah.toml and corpus/jewish_mysticism/sefer-yetirah/, plus any raw/jewish_mysticism/sefer-yetirah.* leftover.
- Re-run embed_corpus.py + graph rebuild so the 6 dropped chunks are removed from guru.db (chunk_embeddings + EXPRESSES edges) and from export.py output.

ACCEPTANCE: no sefer-yetirah anywhere (chunking/, corpus/, raw/); sefer-yetzirah remains; reconciliation diff clean; guru.db has no dangling chunk_embeddings for the deleted chunk ids.
Parent: c75f8a2e.
